chapter_title.en: The Reward of Voluntary Prayers During the Time of Heedlessness

parts.text: 1569 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

text: : «إِذَا صَلَّيْتَ فَصَلِّ فِي نَعْلَيْكَ إِذَا كَانَتْ طَاهِرَةً فَإِنَّ ذَلِكَ مِنَ اَلسُّنَّةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1569 - It is narrated from Him (Imam Al-Sadiq (as)) through Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Abdillah that Imam (as) said:
"If you pray, then pray in your sandals (shoes) if they are clean, for that is from the Sunnah."
